Book Appointment
Skip to content
Grounding tool for routine stress support. If you feel unsafe or in crisis, please contact emergency services instead of relying on this exercise.

Resources

Horizon scan
Resources FAQ Book Contact

Horizon scan grounding exercise

Let your eyes follow the moving point while your head stays still. Many people find this helpful when they want a steadier visual focus and a slower breathing rhythm.
